Decision: HOLD all 7 overrides. Composite distress meta-trigger 0/3 (P&L positive with deepened buffer / no single-name distress, trail-stops continuing to lock profit on 4+ holdings per 12:18 MODIFY cluster / every sector holds 10+ pp cap buffer). Tighten side: zero firing triggers, BFSI 3-name rebuy is the closest watch but 4.43 pp under cap and BFSI add of ≥₹44k still needed to fire leg (b). Loosen side: leg (j) BAJAJ-AUTO loss kills the profitable-by-EOD precondition until another today-admitted name banks profit; leg (k) deployment regressed; conf-floor block count regressed strictly. Re-tightening on disciplined sizing, profitable rotation, and cap-respecting concentration would punish the calibration producing desired outcomes. Premature loosening with leg (j) precondition broken would skip the validation gate.

Watch items for afternoon: (1) BFSI 3rd-name rebuy via BANDHANBNK is the day's closest tighten condition — any 4th BFSI admission fires leg (a) immediately and any ≥₹44k BFSI net add fires leg (b); (2) BAJAJ-AUTO same-day round-trip at 62 min is the 2nd-closest watch — any second same-day round-trip on a today-admitted name advances leg (j-seed) to n=2 trigger and seeds min_confidence 0.60→0.62; (3) ANANTRAJ on fill at 3.56% SL distance moved leg (e) to n=1 — any 2 more ≥3.5% SL admissions today fires max_sl_pct 0.045→0.035; (4) ADANIPORTS conf=0.70 admitted 09:42 (~2hr 48min ago) is the longest-running today admission and the leading candidate for the loosen-leg (j) profitable-by-EOD precondition (must offset BAJAJ-AUTO's loss); (5) the 2 confidence=0.0 BLOCKED rows are an operational signal — system/SL-trigger orders without confidence are getting filtered through the 0.60 floor — flag for strategy-side fix (attach proper confidence to system orders) — NOT a risk-monitor parameter call; (6) 4 operational BLOCKED races (CNC short-sell-after-clear ×3 + MODIFY-no-position ×2 with COALINDIA the latest) form a recurring pattern owed a strategy-side hardening fix; (7) BAJFINANCE 1.41 R:R cross-day n=1 sub-1.5 admission still held — its eventual exit outcome is the cleanest test of whether the R:R floor itself needs adjustment; (8) deployment trajectory in 46-52% oscillation band needs a sustained step-up to satisfy leg (k); afternoon admissions at conf ≥0.70 and lump notional ≥₹86k can fire it cleanly.
